import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut token = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let v = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        sum = sum + v
        count = count + 1
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    let v = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    sum = sum + v
    count = count + 1
  end
  let avg = if count == 0
    0
  else
    sum / count
  end
  println("avg=#{avg}")
end
